issues.description: Condition type should be 'Always' not 'HasRestingDon'. The card text '[DON!! x1]' is a cost requirement (you must have 1 resting DON to activate), not a condition check. This should be represented in the cost structure, not as a game-state condition in effects[].
Target specifies 'maxCost:6' but missing 'maxCount:1' to enforce 'up to 1' limit. The action should include maxCount:1 to restrict selection to a single character.
